This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] image with zero width
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] image with zero height
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] image with zero width and height
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] image with no width/height attributes
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] foreignObject with zero width
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] foreignObject with zero height
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] foreignObject with zero width and height
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] foreignObject with no width/height attributes
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] rect with negative width and scale(2) (not rendered)
  assert_equals: height expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] zero-dim rect inside rotated group (not rendered)
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] zero-width rect with scale(3) (not rendered)
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] zero-radius circle with translate (not rendered)
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
Harness: the test ran to completion.
